scenario.name: Caller Screening Test
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:screening-test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "Blocked Caller" <sip:blocked@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid][call_number] To: <sip:screening-test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:blocked@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp-ScreeningTest/1.0 X-Test-Block: yes Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=Screening Test c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 6000 RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

ACK sip:screening-test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "Blocked Caller" <sip:blocked@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid][call_number] To: <sip:screening-test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Content-Length: 0
